rationale: Educ. Code §44.003 governs superintendent recordkeeping and reporting duties. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The superintendent shall ensure that records are kept and that copies of all budgets, all forms, and all other reports are filed on behalf of the school district at the proper times and in the proper offices as required by this code.
_note: Rule text concerns administrative recordkeeping; no operative connection to homestead exemption valuation.
